channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish and overflowing bin, 13th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Batley Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tumble dryer SE18 5SD, 13th June
item.description:
A tumble dryer has been dumped at the side of 11 Marine Drive SE18 5SD on the steps leading down to Gorman Road Carpark.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marine Drive, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses fly tipped, 13th June
item.description:
These mattresses are blocking the footpath so it means people have to step in the road or touch the mattress. Please can they be collected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hillreach, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip glass and wood, 13th June
item.description:
Someone has dunped rubbish adjacent to the cycle path at the southern tip of Kangley Bridge Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip blocking cycle path, 13th June
item.description:
A skip is parked on the cycle path impeding travel

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Section of dead tree overhanging path, 13th June
item.description:
A tree appears to have died and is overhanging a bench and pedestrain / cycle route.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no. 90, 13th June
item.description:
Street light (post with number 9) has not been working the last three nights.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grafton Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 13th June
item.description:
Had engineer to fix on 11/06/26 it came back on for one night and tonight it’s out again. It’s extremely dangerous and dark and need to be repaired
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Central Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unknown works taking place, 13th June
item.description:
Large pole erected at end of alley without any warning to residents. Purpose of works unknown and yet very loud and disruptive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bicknor Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Very dangerous loose road sign!, 13th June
item.description:
The triangular School road sign in front of #48/50 is missing an attachment strap at the back and the bottom one is very loose already. You can see and hear the sign moving when there is some wind. Very dangerous and heavy road sign could drop anytime and seriously injure someone. Please reattach properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Arlington Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation that requires pruning, 13th June
item.description:
The vegetation has not been attended to for sometime hence the growth which is now encroaching on the property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Star Lane, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance into estate, 13th June
item.description:
No pavement has been done at the across the entrance of the estate where cars drive into. The pavement/speed hump is far too steep on the way out of the estates causing damage to cars. No matter how slow you go the front of the car bumper hits the pavement/crub/speed hump. The ground on the estate side needs to be raised a little to avoid this problem. We have paid thousands of pounds for our cars and this new road layout is causing damage to our cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Torriano Avenue, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faulty lamp, 13th June
item.description:
Lamp goes on and off every 20 seconds
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Blocking parking, 12th June
item.description:
Still blocking at least two parking spots

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Harberton Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 12th June
item.description:
Dead fox on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pawleyne Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 12th June
item.description:
This street lamppost has been not working for weeks. I’m not sure if anyone else has reported it. Our close is very dark because this lamppost is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Beeches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mounds, 12th June
item.description:
Some fencing had recently been added but there are still a number of gaps and where wood has split from posts has left sharp wooden daggers sticking upwards this will cause injury if landed on. Could benefit from the whole of the posts being replaced stronger with no gaps for children to fall between and injure

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Imperial Way, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gates, 12th June
item.description:
Gate at the bottom end of the park going towards the stream open outwards so just have to be pushed by younger children and they are out this happened 4 times during the time I was there benefit from a latch across the top to prevent, also the gate that is on the roadside

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Imperial Way, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox (double bagged, left by pavement), 12th June
item.description:
Dead fox found in garden of 31 Stone Park Avenue. I double bagged and left by pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too much Hedge into the pavement, 12th June
item.description:
Too much Hedge into the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
